revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Notable foreigners who visited China |title = Notable foreigners who visited pre-Qing China |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist
|groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Pre-Yuan |list1 = * [[Kumārajīva]] (344–413) * [[Śubhakarasiṃha]] (637-735) * [[Vajrabodhi]] (671–741) * [[Peroz III]] (7th c.) * [[Narsieh]] (7th c.) * [[Ono no Imoko]] (7th c.) * [[Takamuko no Kuromaro]] (7th c.) * [[Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas]] (7th c.) * [[Bodhisena]] (704–760) * [[Amoghavajra]] (705–774) * [[Sugawara no Kiyotomo]] (770-842) * [[Abe no Nakamaro]] (8th c.) * [[Awata no Mahito]] (8th c.) * [[Kibi no Makibi]] (8th c.) * [[Yamanoue no Okura]] (8th c.) * [[Hyecho]] (8th c.) * [[Guangzhou massacre|Abu Zayd Al-Sirafi]] (9th c.) * [[Ch'oe Ch'i-wŏn]] (9th c.) * [[Egaku]] (9th c.) * [[Sulaiman al-Tajir]] (9th c.) * [[Vairocanavajra]] (12th c.)
|group2 = [[Yuan dynasty]] |list2 = * [[Ajall Shams al-Din Omar]] (1211–1279) * [[Niccolò and Maffeo Polo]] (1230–1309) * [[Ahmad Fanakati]] (1242—1282) * [[John of Montecorvino]] (1247–1328) * [[Marco Polo]] (1254–1324) * [[Odoric of Pordenone]] (1286–1331) * [[Dhyānabhadra]] (1289-1363) * [[Giovanni de' Marignolli]] (1290–1353) * [[Sa'id of Mogadishu]] (1301– ? ) * [[Ibn Battuta]] (1304–1369)
|group3 = [[Ming dynasty]] |list3 = * [[Kenchū Keimitsu]] (15th c.) * [[Ghiyāth al-dīn Naqqāsh]] (fl. 1419-22) * [[Galeote Pereira]] (1549-1553) * [[Jorge Álvares]] (16th c.) * [[Fernão Pires de Andrade]] (16th c.) * [[Tomé Pires]] (1465–1540) * [[Leonel de Sousa]] (16th c.) * [['Ali Akbar Khata'i]] (fl. ca. 1500–1516) * [[Matteo Ricci]] (1552–1610) * [[Johann Adam Schall von Bell]] (1591–1666) * [[Ivan Petlin]] (17th c.) }}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option}}
[[Category:China history templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Notable foreigners who visited China |title = Notable foreigners who visited pre-Qing China |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist
|groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Pre-Yuan |list1 = * [[Kumārajīva]] (344–413) * [[Śubhakarasiṃha]] (637-735) * [[Vajrabodhi]] (671–741) * [[Peroz III]] (7th c.) * [[Narsieh]] (7th c.) * [[Ono no Imoko]] (7th c.) * [[Takamuko no Kuromaro]] (7th c.) * [[Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas]] (7th c.) * [[Bodhisena]] (704–760) * [[Amoghavajra]] (705–774) * [[Sugawara no Kiyotomo]] (770-842) * [[Abe no Nakamaro]] (8th c.) * [[Awata no Mahito]] (8th c.) * [[Kibi no Makibi]] (8th c.) * [[Yamanoue no Okura]] (8th c.) * [[Hyecho]] (8th c.) * [[Guangzhou massacre|Abu Zayd Al-Sirafi]] (9th c.) * [[Ch'oe Ch'i-wŏn]] (9th c.) * [[Egaku]] (9th c.) * [[Sulaiman al-Tajir]] (9th c.) * [[Vairocanavajra]] (12th c.)
|group2 = [[Yuan dynasty]] |list2 = * [[Ajall Shams al-Din Omar]] (1211–1279) * [[Niccolò and Maffeo Polo]] (1230–1309) * [[Ahmad Fanakati]] (1242—1282) * [[John of Montecorvino]] (1247–1328) * [[Marco Polo]] (1254–1324) * [[Odoric of Pordenone]] (1286–1331) * [[Dhyānabhadra]] (1289-1363) * [[Giovanni de' Marignolli]] (1290–1353) * [[Sa'id of Mogadishu]] (1301– ? ) * [[Ibn Battuta]] (1304–1369)
|group3 = [[Ming dynasty]] |list3 = * [[Kenchū Keimitsu]] (15th c.) * [[Ghiyāth al-dīn Naqqāsh]] (fl. 1419-22) * [[Galeote Pereira]] (1549-1553) * [[Jorge Álvares]] (16th c.) * [[Fernão Pires de Andrade]] (16th c.) * [[Tomé Pires]] (1465–1540) * [[Leonel de Sousa]] (16th c.) * [['Ali Akbar Khata'i]] (fl. ca. 1500–1516) * [[Matteo Ricci]] (1552–1610) * [[Johann Adam Schall von Bell]] (1591–1666) * [[Ivan Petlin]] (17th c.) }}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option}}
[[Category:China history templates]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox |name = Notable foreigners who visited China |title = Notable foreigners who visited pre-Qing China |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist
|groupstyle = text-align: center;
|group1 = Pre-Yuan |list1 = * [[Kumārajīva]] (344–413) * [[Śubhakarasiṃha]] (637-735) * [[Vajrabodhi]] (671–741) * [[Peroz III]] (7th c.) * [[Narsieh]] (7th c.) * [[Ono no Imoko]] (7th c.) * [[Takamuko no Kuromaro]] (7th c.) * [[Sa'd ibn Abi Wa11as]] (7th c.) * [[Bodhisena]] (704–760) * [[Amoghavajra]] (705–774) * [[Sugawara no Kiyotomo]] (770-842) * [[Abe no Nakamaro]] (8th c.) * [[Awata no Mahito]] (8th c.) * [[Kibi no Makibi]] (8th c.) * [[Yamanoue no Okura]] (8th c.) * [[Hyecho]] (8th c.) * [[Guangzhou massacre|Abu Zayd Al-Sirafi]] (9th c.) * [[Ch'oe Ch'i-wŏn]] (9th c.) * [[Egaku]] (9th c.) * [[Sulaiman al-Tajir]] (9th c.) * [[Vairocanavajra]] (12th c.)
|group2 = [[Yuan dynasty]] |list2 = * [[Ajall Shams al-Din Omar]] (1211–1279) * [[Niccolò and Maffeo Polo]] (1230–1309) * [[Ahmad Fanakati]] (1242—1282) * [[John of Montecorvino]] (1247–1328) * [[Marco Polo]] (1254–1324) * [[Odoric of Pordenone]] (1286–1331) * [[Dhyānabhadra]] (1289-1363) * [[Giovanni de' Marignolli]] (1290–1353) * [[Sa'id of Mogadishu]] (1301– ? ) * [[Ibn Battuta]] (1304–1369)
|group3 = [[Ming dynasty]] |list3 = * [[Kenchū Keimitsu]] (15th c.) * [[Ghiyāth al-dīn Na11āsh]] (fl. 1419-22) * [[Galeote Pereira]] (1549-1553) * [[Jorge Álvares]] (16th c.) * [[Fernão Pires de Andrade]] (16th c.) * [[Tomé Pires]] (1465–1540) * [[Leonel de Sousa]] (16th c.) * [['Ali Akbar Khata'i]] (fl. ca. 1500–1516) * [[Matteo Ricci]] (1552–1610) * [[Johann Adam Schall von Bell]] (1591–1666) * [[Ivan Petlin]] (17th c.) }}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23518067722|commit triggered pipeline]]
